quote: Cooking is like painting or writing a song. Just as there are only so many notes or colors, there are only so many flavors—it's how you combine them that sets you apart.
author: Wolfgang Puck

quote: People who love to eat are always the best people.
author: Julia Child

quote: Food is not just eating energy. It's an experience.
author: Guy Fieri

quote: The only time to eat diet food is while you're waiting for the steak to cook.
author: Julia Child

quote: A recipe has no soul. You, as the cook, must bring soul to the recipe.
author: Thomas Keller

quote: If you're afraid of butter, use cream.
author: Julia Child

quote: Food is our common ground, a universal experience.
author: James Beard

quote: No one is born a great cook, one learns by doing.
author: Julia Child

quote: The secret of success in life is to eat what you like and let the food fight it out inside.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Cooking is all about people. Food is maybe the only universal thing that really has the power to bring everyone together.
author: Guy Fieri

quote: Tell me what you eat, and I will tell you what you are.
author: Jean Anthelme Brillat-Savarin

quote: Life is a combination of magic and pasta.
author: Federico Fellini
